summary: Iteration 68: Branch Transfer Page Bug Fixes - ALL 3 BUGS VERIFIED FIXED. Bug 1: QR upload panel now uses createPortal with z-index 99999. Bug 2: Send button NOT shown on Incoming tab (isSourceBranch returns false). Bug 3: Print button (FileText icon) now visible on Outgoing tab.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - pre-existing, minor issue
Hydration errors due to nested table elements (th inside span) - pre-existing, does not affect functionality

BUG_1_QR_PORTAL_OVERLAY.description: Phone upload QR in receive dialog was blocked by Dialog overlay
BUG_1_QR_PORTAL_OVERLAY.implementation: QRPanel uses createPortal to render to document.body with z-index 99999
tests_performed: Opened receive dialog on Incoming tab for sent transfer
QR panel appeared as full-screen overlay above dialog

BUG_2_SEND_BUTTON_ON_INCOMING.description: Send button incorrectly showing on Incoming tab
tests_performed: Navigated to Branch Transfers > History > Incoming tab
Found 0 Send buttons on Incoming tab
Found 0 Cancel buttons on Incoming tab (also uses isSourceBranch)

BUG_3_PRINT_BUTTON_ON_OUTGOING.description: Missing print button on Outgoing transfers
BUG_3_PRINT_BUTTON_ON_OUTGOING.implementation: FileText icon button added for outgoing with draft/sent/received/received_pending status
tests_performed: Navigated to Branch Transfers > History > Outgoing tab
Found 43 Print buttons on Outgoing tab
Found 5 Send buttons (correct, for draft orders)

critical_code_review_comments: BranchTransferPage.js lines 1474-1475: isSourceBranch/isDestBranch correctly check historyTab
BranchTransferPage.js lines 1501-1507: Print button added with FileText icon for outgoing transfers
ReceiptUploadInline.js QRPanel function: Correctly uses createPortal with z-index 99999
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 verified 3 bug fixes on Branch Transfers page: (1) QR upload panel in receive dialog now uses createPortal with z-99999 to render above dialog overlay, (2) Send button no longer appears on Incoming tab because isSourceBranch returns false for incoming transfers, (3) Print button (FileText icon) now appears on Outgoing tab for draft/sent/received/received_pending status. All fixes working correctly. No issues found.
